c.d: How intuitive and easy it is for users to navigate and utilize the app’s photo effects and editing features

c.n: Range of Photo Effects and Filters
c.d: Number and quality of built-in photo effects, filters, and artistic styles available within the app
Availability of advanced photo editing features such as selective adjustments, healing tools, object removal, and AI-powered edits
Whether the app is available on major platforms iOS and Android, or exclusive to one
App cost structure including free, freemium with subscriptions, or paid one-time purchase
